testcase.name: test_get_reminder_preferences_unauthorized
testcase.error: tests/test_notifications_system.py:26: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please slow down.","retry_after":"5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

Please slow down.","retry_after":"5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
